title: Logz.io Metric Sample
description: Representation of a single time-series sample as returned by the Logz.io Prometheus-compatible metrics gateway. Mirrors the upstream Prometheus query result envelope shape.

metric.description: Label set identifying the time series, including __name__, plus user labels.

value.description: [timestamp_seconds, value_as_string] tuple for an instant query.

items.description: Sample value encoded as string per Prometheus convention.

values.description: Array of [timestamp, value] tuples for a range query.
